title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Asian Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Asian Paints
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints:
Asian Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints!
